title: A Town Dropped Its Spare Change in a Jar for a Year. It Just Wiped Out Every Student's Lunch Debt.
dek: Residents fed coins into a jug at the hardware store all year. Twelve months later, not a single kid in the district owes a cent — and the jug is already filling back up.

title: Lost Dog Walks 40 Miles Home, Turns Up at the Door Like Nothing Happened

Shelter Empties for the First Time in 30 Years as Every Last Pet Finds a Home
dek: Staff lined up for a photo in front of rows of empty kennels. "We've literally never seen this," the director said.

title: Divers Free a Whale Tangled in Netting — Then It Circles Back, As If to Say Thanks
dek: The rescue took two hours. The send-off, captured on a drone, has been watched four million times.

title: A Penguin Colony Has Doubled in Size Since Conservationists Stepped In
dek: Five years ago the count was falling fast. The new survey put it at the highest number on record.

title: A 9-Year-Old Saved His Allowance for Months to Buy Winter Coats for His Whole Class

An AI Flagged Her Cancer Three Years Before Doctors Would Have. She's Now Cancer-Free.
dek: The model spotted a faint pattern in a routine scan that the eye tends to miss. Her oncologist calls it "the catch of a lifetime."

title: Researchers Used AI to Decode Whale Calls — Then They Started Answering Back
dek: After months of listening, the team played a phrase into the deep. A humpback paused, circled the boat, and replied.

title: A Free AI Helpline Now Reads Every Letter, Bill and Form Aloud for People Who Struggle to Read
dek: Call the number, hold up the page, and a calm voice explains it. Half a million people used it in the first month.
